title: Version
description: A specific Version of a Resource.

epoch.description: A numeric value used to determine whether an entity has been modified.

isDefault.description: Indicates whether this Version is the default Version of the owning Resource.

description.description: A human-readable summary of the purpose of the entity.

documentation.description: A URL to additional information about this entity.

icon.description: A URL to a graphical icon for the owning entity.

labels.description: A mechanism in which additional metadata about the entity can be stored without changing the model definition of the entity. Labels can be used for querying.

createdAt.description: The date/time of when the entity was created.

modifiedAt.description: The date/time of when the entity was last updated.

ancestor.description: The versionId of this Version's ancestor, or this Version's versionId if it has no ancestor.

contentType.description: The media type of the entity as defined by RFC9110.

formatValidated.description: When format validation is enabled, indicates whether the server has validated that the Version conforms to the rules defined by its `format` attribute.

compatibilityValidated.description: When compatibility validation is enabled, indicates whether the server has validated that the Version conforms to the rules defined by its Resource's `meta.compatibility` attribute.

document.description: The raw document content for this Version as base64-encoded bytes. The interpretation (schema, thing description, thing model, …) is determined by the parent Resource's type.

documentHash.description: The hash of the document content for this Version.
